div.head: 269. Memorandum of a Conversation Between the Canadian Ambassador (Robertson) and the Acting Assistant Secretary of State for Economic Affairs (Armstrong), Ambassador’s Residence, Washington, July 24, 1957Source: Department of State, Central Files, 411.006/7–2457. Confidential. Drafted by Armstrong.

list.head: SUBJECT
list.item: Cabinet Committee Report on Crude Oil Imports

div.p: In the course of a lunch at the home of the Canadian Ambassador, I had occasion to inform him generally of the nature of the Cabinet Committee report on crude oil imports.Infra. He expressed great satisfaction with the way in which the formula would operate, and with the fact that no practical limitation on Canadian oil was being proposed.
